description: Create a two-column content slide on international marquee travel intent, with a horizontal bar chart on traveler segments at left and a regional destination summary at right.

header.headline: Europe holds its share as the international destination of choice, while the balance of trips within North America shifts toward Canada
header.sub: Luxury travelers and millennials are among the groups showing high international travel intent

left.title: Percentage of group traveling internationally for marquee trip

right.title: Destination for international marquee trip, by region

footer.source: Notes: Question: “Which international region will you be flying to?” (n = 458 planning to travel internationally on their longest trip of the season); pp stands for percentage points; *Early bookers are respondents whose longest trip of summer 2026 was fully booked (air and lodging) when the survey was fielded. Source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey.
